Meaning.Vi: bắt giữ, bắt giữ vì nghi ngờ phạm tội
Meaning.En: to take someone into custody by legal authority, typically because they are suspected of committing a crime
Meaning.Example: The police arrested the suspect after reviewing the surveillance footage.

Situation.Vi: Cảnh sát đưa một người vào trại giam sau khi nghi ngờ người đó gây án.
Situation.En: Police take a person into custody after suspecting them of committing a crime.

Meaning.Vi: sự bắt giữ, sự tống giam
Meaning.En: the action of taking someone into custody by legal authority; the state of being taken into custody
Meaning.Example: He was released after 24 hours without formal arrest.

Situation.Vi: Sau khi bị bắt giữ, bị cáo được quyền im lặng và có luật sư.
Situation.En: After arrest, the suspect has the right to remain silent and to have a lawyer.

Meaning.Vi: sự ngăn cản, sự làm ngừng lại (không chính thức)
Meaning.En: a stop or slowdown in the progress or development of something
Meaning.Example: The project faced an arrest in funding due to budget cuts.

Situation.Vi: Dự án bị tạm ngưng do thiếu vốn.
Situation.En: The project was temporarily halted due to lack of funding.
